$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json auth explain --user alice --action EntityService.Get --target entity:test_light
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: not_found: user not found
Usage:
  switchyard auth explain [flags]

Flags:
      --action string   Service.Method
  -h, --help            help for explain
      --target string   kind:id (e.g. entity:lock.front_door)
      --user string     user slug to check
      --verb string     verb (default "call")

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

not_found: user not found
